chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI High Court Appeal No. 409 & 410 of 2018 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing on main case. 2. For hearing on CMA No. 3359/18. 01.12.2025 Mr. Ghulam Muhammad, advocate holding brief for Mr. Faiz Durrani, advocate for appellants. Mr. Ghazi Khan Khalil, advocate for Respondent SSGC along with Mr. Raja Lov Kush, Deputy Manager (Legal) SSGC. Ms. Zehrah Sehr Vayani, Assistant Attorney General. These matters are pending since 2018 without any progress. Today, brief is being held and time is being sought for no cogent reason whatsoever. These appeals are clogging the docket for more than seven years. It appears that the appellants are not interested in proceeding with these appeals, therefore, the same are dismissed for non-prosecution. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in the connected file. Judge Judge Ayaz P.S.
